name: GOLFTEC Arrowhead
about: GOLFTEC Arrowhead is a high-tech golf training center that utilizes data-driven instruction and advanced technology to improve players' games. The facility offers indoor golf lessons using OPTIMOTION motion capture technology, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide precise feedback on swing mechanics. Services include personalized coaching, club fittings, and practice sessions designed for accelerated improvement. The venue caters to golfers seeking structured, technical practice in a controlled environment focused on skill development and game enhancement.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced technology including OPTIMOTION motion capture and launch monitors for precise swing analysis
Data-driven coaching with personalized improvement plans tailored to individual goals
Professional club fittings that add an average of 21 more yards off the tee

simulator_hardware.notes: Launch monitor for ball flight and impact data analysis

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, it is recommended to bring your own clubs for lessons and practice sessions. However, club rentals may be available depending on the location.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The policy on outside food and drink is not specified. It's best to check with the center directly for their specific rules regarding personal items.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time for a full 18-hole simulation session can vary depending on factors like simulator wait times and session length. A typical session may last 1-2 hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC offers junior programs and instruction, making it suitable for youth golfers. However, specific amenities for children are not detailed.
